latin: Aliquo modo ego moderor. Michael librum de arte moderandi scribere volebat. titulus erat 'Aliquo Modo Ego Moderor.' liber unam paginam habebat — imaginem eius ridentis.

questions.prompt: What did Michael want to write?

questions.target: Only one page with his picture smiling
choices: Only one page with his picture smiling

translation: Somehow I manage. Michael wanted to write a book about the art of managing. The title was 'Somehow I Manage.' The book had one page — a picture of him smiling.
